gold.title: Image Swiper
gold.reason: Drag-to-swipe image gallery card with spring physics, ghost navigation buttons on hover, image counter, and keyboard-free swipe detection. Designed for real estate listing cards — immediately deployable on property, portfolio, or product showcase sites.

gold.title: Image Comparison Slider (Horizontal)
gold.reason: Before/after draggable horizontal comparison slider with clip-path reveal, a polished centered handle, and global cursor feedback. High-impact component for design studios, photo editors, skincare brands, or any before/after showcase.

gold.title: Thumbnail Carousel
gold.reason: Full-featured image gallery with a main draggable carousel and an animated thumbnail strip that expands the active thumbnail. Polished UX for product pages, photography portfolios, or real estate listings requiring multi-image browsing.

gold.title: RuixenCarouselWave
gold.reason: GSAP-powered 3D wave carousel where the center card lifts and scales up, with badge overlays, glassmorphism text panels, and infinite loop navigation. Visually premium for agency feature showcases, template galleries, or SaaS landing pages.

gold.title: Feedback Slider
gold.reason: Highly animated sentiment slider with morphing emoji eyes, color-shifting background, bold animated text labels, and spring-physics indicator. Unique and memorable for survey sections, checkout flows, or interactive testimonial widgets.

gold.title: Infinite Slider Horizontal
gold.reason: Smooth infinite-loop horizontal marquee slider with configurable speed, hover-to-slow, vertical/horizontal direction, and reverse options. Essential for logo marquees, testimonial strips, and tech-stack scrolling sections on marketing sites.

silver.title: Slider Number Flow
silver.reason: Standard Radix slider enhanced with animated NumberFlow digit transitions on the thumb label. Elegant micro-interaction polish suitable for pricing sliders, quantity selectors, or interactive pricing calculators.

silver.title: Slider
silver.reason: Rubber-band physics slider with volume icon reactions at boundaries, hover scale, and sigmoid overflow decay. Delightful UI pattern for audio controls, pricing selectors, or any slider where boundary feedback adds character.

silver.title: Image Comparison Slider Vertical
silver.reason: Vertical clip-path before/after slider with a centered drag handle. Complementary to the horizontal version; useful for portrait-oriented image comparisons in photography, beauty, or before/after content.

silver.title: Range Slider
silver.reason: Price range dual-thumb slider with a histogram bar chart showing data distribution, currency formatting, and accessible keyboard navigation. Well-suited for e-commerce filter sidebars and real estate search pages.

silver.title: Dual Range Slider
silver.reason: Clean Radix-based dual-thumb range slider with configurable label position above or below each thumb. A reliable, accessible utility for price filters, date range selectors, or form configurations.

silver.title: SnappySlider
silver.reason: Feature-dense slider with snap-to markers, direct numeric input, out-of-bounds indicator, double-click reset, and keyboard arrow support. Excellent for design tools, configuration UIs, or advanced settings panels.

silver.title: Slider [react-aria-components]
silver.reason: Accessible slider built on React Aria with full ARIA semantics, horizontal/vertical orientation, and a separate fill-track primitive. Good choice for accessibility-focused projects or component systems needing WAI-ARIA compliance.

silver.title: Slider
silver.reason: Neobrutalism-styled slider with thick border, hard box shadow, and bold visual design system via CSS variables. Distinctive for sites using a neobrutalist design language; limited to that specific aesthetic.

bronze.title: QR Code
bronze.reason: QR code generator tool that uses a slider only for size control — the slider is incidental to a utility app component. Categorized as slider but has no carousel or visual slider value for marketing site redesign.

bronze.title: Range Slider
bronze.reason: A standalone 0-100 range slider demo with dark mode toggle and a grid background. Functionally complete but ships as a full-page demo rather than a reusable component; limited drop-in value without refactoring.

bronze.title: Slider
bronze.reason: The default shadcn slider component — a minimal Radix primitive wrapper with standard styling. Foundational utility but offers no visual differentiation; every shadcn project already includes this.

bronze.title: Slider
bronze.reason: Thin Radix slider wrapper with tooltip dependency and minor CSS variable tweaks. Nearly identical to shadcn's default slider with negligible differentiation; very low download count confirms limited adoption.

bronze.title: Slider
bronze.reason: Raw HTML range input styled with inline CSS and jsx-style tag for the thumb. Non-idiomatic React approach with zero downloads; no accessibility primitives and minimal visual value for production redesigns.

bronze.title: Slider
bronze.reason: Identical implementation to shugar__slider-1 with a minor class name change (geist-slider). Duplicate component with no added value, zero meaningful downloads, and no upgrade over existing shadcn primitives.
